text:
心頭滅却したはずなのに
全然涼しくない……
くそ、所詮は造語かっ！

ま、戦い始めたら暑さを気にしてる
ヒマなんてないし、いいかな。

さあさ、暑さを忘れるくらい集中して
ガンガン先導してっ

They say clearing your mind is a good way to
cool your head, but why do I get the feeling
I'm not actually cooling down at all?

I guess we might as well just get to it.
A little battle should be enough to
take my mind of the heat, yeah?

So go on then, lead us forward! Keep us so
focused we forget how hot it is out here!
